title: Life in the City
text: Sara lives in a big city with her family. The city is always busy, with many people, cars, and buses everywhere. In the morning, the streets are crowded because people go to work and students go to school.

Sara uses public transportation to move around the city. Sometimes it is fast, but at other times it is slow because of traffic. Although city life can be noisy and stressful, Sara likes it because everything she needs is close to her home.

In the evening, Sara enjoys walking in the streets or sitting in a café with her friends. Living in the city is not always easy, but it gives her many opportunities to learn, work, and meet new people.

questions.question: Where does Sara live?
questions.answer: She lives in a big city

questions.question: Why are the streets crowded in the morning?
questions.answer: Because people go to work and students go to school

questions.question: How does Sara move around the city?
Why can transportation be slow sometimes?
Why does Sara like living in the city?
questions.answer: Because everything she needs is close to her home

questions.question: What does Sara like to do in the evening?
questions.answer: She likes walking in the streets or sitting in a café with her friends

questions.question: Why do you think Sara accepts the stress of city life?
questions.answer: Because living in the city gives her many opportunities and everything she needs is close to her home
